hero.headline: *Same day* fixes — even Saturdays
hero.subheadline: From garbage disposals to drywall patches, we show up when you need us most.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Everything that breaks, we handle
services_section.subheading: No job too small, no timeline too tight

services.title: Plumbing Repairs
services.description: Garbage disposals, sink clogs, pipe fixes. We carry the parts and know the tricks.

services.title: Drywall & Paint
services.description: Holes, cracks, ceiling damage. Patch it, prime it, paint it smooth.

services.title: Home Repairs
services.description: Doors, windows, fixtures, trim work. Whatever's not working right.

services.title: Emergency Service
services.description: Weekend calls, urgent fixes, selling your home tomorrow fixes.

about.heading: Real handymen, real solutions
about.body: We're the Hagerstown team that picks up the phone and shows up on time. No project management fees, no upselling — just honest work.

reviews.name: Jim W.
reviews.text: Wonderful job on a bunch of odds and ends. Fit me in fast because I was selling my home. Even came out on Saturday.

reviews.name: Heath B.
reviews.text: Leonardo and his son installed a new garbage disposal. Outstanding, professional job — and they came out on Sunday!

reviews.name: Alicia B.
reviews.text: Very thankful for Miguel's excellent service. Came out on short notice and resolved the kitchen pipe clog.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving Hagerstown and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout Washington County

cta.heading: Ready to fix what's broken?
cta.body: Call now for same-day service. We answer our phone and show up when we say we will.
